arts.ttl: Star warned against Arsenal or Liverpool move, could be worth £200m in the future
Arsenal fans send Marcus Rashford transfer message as Manchester United forward says he’s ready for new challenge
arts.sum: Arsenal fans have been having their say on whether they would take Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford at the Emirates Stadium. On Tuesday, Rashford said...

arts.ttl: Report: What Arsenal will have to do if they want to sign Mohamed Kudus from West Ham
Arsenal warned over £115m Liverpool transfer hijack
arts.sum: The Gunners have scored 29 goals in the Premier League this season, but that is fewer than four other teams in the division. The Gunners ' top goalscorers are Kai Havertz and Bukayo Saka, who both have five in the Premier League .

arts.ttl: £54m January transfer, Saka concern - Arsenal Premier League title verdict
arts.sum: Though the Gunners are not currently keeping up with the two teams at the top, with Liverpool also having a game in hand that could see them go a total of nine points clear, there is still plenty of the season left. Arsenal will be remaining hopeful of finally winning the Premier League title after two seasons of being pipped to the crown by Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'open' to January transfer as swap deal with £45m star emerges
arts.sum: Even though the January window has yet to open, Arsenal have been credited with an interest in several potential new signings who could be added to Arteta's squad following the six new arrivals from last summer. It has been reported that Arsenal are open to the idea of signing the striker on loan in the New Year if a move presents itself.

arts.ttl: Liverpool luck continues as Arsenal red card repeat sees Spurs facing Robertson
arts.sum: It is certainly more lucky that Liverpool not only have the, on paper, easiest draw of the quarter-finals but also a tough following league game that Robertson will not miss. The Gunners remain clinging on to the coattails of Liverpool by six points although Arne Slot’s side have a game in hand.

arts.ttl: 'My son went to the game': David Seaman shares what his son did at Arsenal v Everton that reflects badly on the Gunners
arts.sum: Arsenal dropped yet more points in the Premier League at the weekend as they were held to a 0-0 draw by Everton. The Gunners struggled...

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala says he has seen a player at Arsenal who's even better than Liverpool star Alexis Mac Allister
Arsenal and Chelsea renew Interest in Dusan Vlahovic
arts.sum: As the January transfer window approaches, Premier League rivals Arsenal and Chelsea have reignited their interest in Juventus striker Dusan Vlahovic. The post Arsenal and Chelsea renew Interest in Dusan Vlahovic appeared first on FootItalia.com.
